app.name: CareTalk
app.headline: Global Caregiver Translation Platform
app.slogan: Connecting patients, guardians, caregivers & medical staff with real-time AI translation.

interpreter.title: Care Interpreter
interpreter.subtitle: Real-time interpretation between caregivers and patients
interpreter.inputPlaceholder: Enter text or use voice input

careLog.title: Care Log
careLog.subtitle: Record daily care and share with guardians and medical staff
careLog.recordGuide: Voice recording auto-converts to text in 30s intervals

ocr.title: Photo Analysis
ocr.subtitle: Analyze IV bags, medicine, and prescriptions into text
ocr.guide: Reference text analysis only. Not a medical diagnosis.
ocr.warningDetail: Dangerous phrases detected. Please consult medical staff.
ocr.uploadGuide: Upload a photo or take a picture

chat.welcome: Hello! I'm CareTalk support. How can I help you?

items.a: CareTalk is a professional care translation, recording, and delivery platform that bridges language barriers between foreign caregivers and patients, guardians, and medical staff.

items.q: Can I use it without signing up?
items.a: Yes, most features including community posts are available for free without registration.

items.q: Is interpretation between caregivers and patients possible?
items.a: Yes, we translate caregivers' foreign languages to Korean and patients' Korean to caregivers' languages in real-time.
We support 19 languages including Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, French, German, Russian, Vietnamese, Hindi, Portuguese, Indonesian, Arabic, Spanish, Thai, and Mongolian.
Yes, press the microphone button and speak, and your voice will be converted to text and automatically translated.

items.q: Can patient speech be converted to caregiver language?
items.a: Yes, select 'Patient → Caregiver Language' mode to translate Korean speech to the caregiver's language.

items.q: Can caregiver speech be converted to Korean?
items.a: Yes, select 'Caregiver → Korean' mode to translate foreign speech to Korean.

items.q: How do I write a care log?
items.a: In the Care Log menu, you can enter or voice-record patient status, meals, medication, sleep, and special notes.

items.q: Does voice recording convert to text?
items.a: Yes, 30-second voice recordings are automatically converted to text.

items.q: Can I send care logs to guardians?
items.a: Yes, care logs can be sent to guardians via KakaoTalk, Telegram, or PDF.
Yes, translation results, care logs, and OCR results can be shared via KakaoTalk.
Yes, translation results, care logs, and OCR results can be shared via Telegram.
Yes, upload a prescription photo to extract text and summarize it in Korean.
Yes, upload medicine package photos to extract and translate medicine information.

items.q: Can IV bag photos be analyzed?
items.a: Yes, IV label photos are analyzed to extract ingredient and dosage information.
Yes, OCR-extracted text can be translated to your selected language and sent to guardians or medical staff.

items.q: Can I post caregiver job listings?
items.a: Yes, post free job listings in the 'Need a Caregiver' community board without registration.
Yes, post profiles including certificates, experience, and available languages in the 'I'm a Caregiver' board.
Yes, you can edit your registered posts anytime using the edit button.
Yes, we support PC file upload, smartphone camera, and gallery upload.
Yes, a mobile-optimized UI ensures convenient use on smartphones.

items.q: Does it fill the screen on PC?
items.a: Yes, PC uses a wide Dense UI that maximizes screen real estate.
Yes, each post has a chat button for direct communication.

items.q: Can I consult with an admin?
items.a: Yes, click the consultation button at the bottom left to start a real-time chat.
Yes, enable auto-translate in chat to automatically translate messages to the other party's language.
Yes, click the video call button in the chat window to start a video call.
Yes, click the voice call button in the chat window to start a voice call.
Yes, click the Map button on a post to view the location on OpenStreetMap.
Yes, all CareTalk features are completely free.

items.q: Is this a medical diagnosis service?
items.a: No. This platform is NOT a medical diagnosis service. It is an assistive platform for care, interpretation, recording, and delivery. OCR analysis is for reference only. All treatment decisions must be confirmed by qualified medical staff including doctors and nurses.

home.heroDesc:
Connecting patients, guardians,
caregivers & medical staff with real-time AI.
